code.title: Enter your school code
code.whereIsMyCode: Where do I find my code?
code.notFound: We couldn't find a school with that code.

otp.title: Check your email
otp.hint: It can take up to a minute (check your spam folder). If it doesn't arrive, resend it or contact support.
otp.sendFailed: We couldn't send you the code. Please try again.
otp.invalidOrExpired: Incorrect or expired code. Check your email and try again.

help.title: Where do I find my code?
help.caption: ↑ This is what your code looks like
help.body1: It's the code your school was given as its unique identifier within Eez4us.
help.body2: If you can't find it, ask your school's administration for it or contact Eez4us support for a replacement.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: We'll email you a link to reset it.

success.title: Check your email
success.body: If {email} is in our system, we sent you a link to create a new password.

reset.title: New password
reset.subtitle: Choose a secure password for your account.

done.title: Password updated
done.body: Taking you to login in a few seconds…

errors.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long.

appError.title: Something went wrong
appError.body: We couldn't load this screen. Try again, and if it keeps happening, let us know.
